div.p: Maps 4MB virtual region to page table

p.strong: Example PDE: Page Table at 0x00150000, kernel RW

g.title: Page Table Base Address (20 bits) Physical address of page table >> 12 Must be 4KB aligned
Accessed: set by CPU on read
Page Table Base Address (20 bits) Physical address of page table >> 12 Must be 4KB aligned
